description_long: This object consists of a flat-panel computer monitor with a widescreen display, accompanied by a full-sized keyboard and a wireless mouse. The monitor features a matte black bezel with a simple, modern design and a sturdy rectangular stand that supports the screen. The display is shown powered on, with a recognizable Windows desktop background and several desktop icons visible. The keyboard is also black, with white and blue markings on the keys, and appears to be a standard QWERTY layout with a numeric keypad. The mouse is compact and wireless, matching the color scheme of the other components. The rear of the monitor is plain, with a vented section and a central support column connecting to a broad, flat base.
description: A modern black flat-panel computer monitor with a matching keyboard and wireless mouse, featuring a simple rectangular stand and a powered-on display.
description_view_0: Front view showing the monitor's screen with a Windows desktop, the full keyboard, and the mouse.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile of the monitor, the depth of the stand, and the relative heights of the keyboard and mouse.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back panel of the monitor, the central support column, and the vented section.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the monitor's slimness and the arrangement of the keyboard and mouse from the other side.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is matte black, thin, and flat with sharp corners and no visible decorative elements, providing a clean and modern look.
attribute_stand_type: Rectangular flat base stand with a vertical central support column, made of matte black plastic, appearing sturdy and stable with no visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons or controls are visible on the front, sides, or rear of the monitor.
